prompt: Animate the provided full-body cartoon female astronaut into a clear front-facing running-in-place loop. Keep the camera locked, vertical 3:4 framing, full body visible from helmet to boots, centered on the same bright green background. The motion must read as real running: alternating knees drive forward, opposite arms pump with bent elbows, one foot supports on contact frames, brief rebound/float between contacts, slight torso bounce tied to foot contact. Preserve the exact character identity: blonde hair, blue eyes, round transparent helmet, white and black astronaut suit, blue/orange accents, black gloves, large black boots, clean vector-cartoon style. Do not merely wobble or liquify the original image. Do not crop helmet, hands, knees, or boots. Do not add limbs, duplicate boots, melt gloves, break the helmet ring, turn to side view, zoom the camera, or change costume. Make it energetic but anatomically plausible.
